page: Microsoft Azure EC32ads_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECadsv6 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by AMD processors. The instance features 32 dedicated vCPUs managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server type includes 1229 GB of bundled local SSD storage and is fully capable of utilizing Premium Storage. The integration of substantial local disk space alongside high-speed storage options provides a balanced architecture for data-intensive operations. No graphics processing units are included in this configuration, and it does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC32ads_v6 offers a high memory-to-core ratio and bundled local storage, reducing the need for external storage attachments for temporary data. This resource profile is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, relational database management systems, large-scale caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring significant memory capacity and fast local scratch space.
description: The Microsoft Azure EC32ads_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECadsv6 family, powered by AMD processors and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high-density ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For storage, the instance is equipped with 1229 GB of bundled local disk capacity and supports Premium Storage configurations. It does not include dedicated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-effective for memory-heavy operations by combining large RAM capacity with substantial local storage. The EC32ads_v6 is optimized for workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caching, data analytics, and enterprise applications requiring high memory-to-CPU ratios.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC32ads_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and 1229 GB of local storage for demanding database and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD processors, high memory density, and substantial bundled local storage for enterprise workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
1229 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability
